    Index

    A B C D E F G H I L M N O P R S U V W 
    All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages|Constant Field Values

    A

    ability() - Method in class character.BasePlayer
    Activates this character's special ability.
    ability() - Method in class character.CatPlayer
    Arms the perfect-aim flag so Controller can lock the angle.
    ability() - Method in class character.DogPlayer
    Heals 1 HP, capped at BasePlayer.getMaxHp().
    ABILITY_COOLDOWN - Static variable in class game.Controller
    Turns before a player's special ability is available again.
    AbilityType - Enum Class in character
    Enumerates the two special ability types available to playable characters.
    AIM - Enum constant in enum class character.AbilityType
    Cat's ability: lock a perfect-aim angle and cancel wind on self.
    AIMING - Enum constant in enum class game.Projectile.State
    Angle is oscillating; player can press SPACE to fire.
    ANGLE_SPEED - Static variable in class game.Projectile
    Degrees added to the angle each frame during oscillation.
    application - package application
     
    application.scene - package application.scene
     
    applyFire(int) - Method in class game.StatusManager
    Applies a burn effect to the given player and starts the fire sound loop.
    applyIce(int, BasePlayer) - Method in class game.StatusManager
    Applies a freeze effect: deals 1 HP to the target and starts the ice sound loop.
    applyWind(int, BasePlayer) - Method in class game.StatusManager
    Applies a wind effect: deals 1 HP to the target and starts the wind sound loop.
    attack - package attack
     
    attack(BasePlayer) - Method in interface attack.Attackable
    Applies this attack's immediate effect to the target.
    attack(BasePlayer) - Method in class attack.FireAttack
     
    attack(BasePlayer) - Method in class attack.IceAttack
     
    attack(BasePlayer) - Method in class attack.NormalAttack
     
    attack(BasePlayer) - Method in class attack.WindAttack
     
    ATTACK_FIRE - Static variable in class game.Controller
    Identifier constant for Fire attacks (used as cooldown map key).
    ATTACK_ICE - Static variable in class game.Controller
    Identifier constant for Ice attacks.
    ATTACK_WIND - Static variable in class game.Controller
    Identifier constant for Wind attacks.
    Attackable - Interface in attack
    Strategy interface for all attack types.

    B

    BasePlayer - Class in character
    Abstract base class for all playable characters.
    BasePlayer(int, int) - Constructor for class character.BasePlayer
    Loads the sprite image and initialises HP.
    bg - Variable in class application.scene.StartScene
    The background image view (public for potential external access).
    BOX_Y1 - Static variable in class game.Projectile
    Top edge of both hit boxes.
    BOX_Y2 - Static variable in class game.Projectile
    Bottom edge of both hit boxes.
    BTN_R - Static variable in class renderer.SkillButtonRenderer
    Radius of each skill button circle in pixels.
    BTN_Y - Static variable in class renderer.SkillButtonRenderer
    Y centre of all skill buttons in pixels.
    build() - Method in class application.scene.CharacterSelectScene
    Constructs and returns the character-select Scene.
    build() - Method in class application.scene.StartScene
    Constructs and returns the main-menu Scene.
    buildEndScene(String, BasePlayer, BasePlayer) - Method in class application.scene.EndScene
    Builds and returns the end-screen Scene.
    BURN_FRAMES_PER_TICK - Static variable in class game.StatusManager
    Frames between consecutive burn ticks (~1 second at 60 fps).
    BURN_TICKS - Static variable in class game.StatusManager
    Number of burn damage ticks after a Fire hit.

    C

    calculatePerfectAngle(boolean, double, double) - Static method in class game.PhysicsUtils
    Brute-force searches for the launch angle (in 0.1° steps) that lands the projectile within HIT_TOLERANCE pixels of the opponent's hitbox centre.
    calculateWindXOffset(int, int, int) - Static method in class game.PhysicsUtils
    Calculates the cosine-based horizontal displacement for the wind-affected player.
    CatPlayer - Class in character
    Cat character.
    CatPlayer() - Constructor for class character.CatPlayer
    Creates a Cat with 10 max HP and 10 starting HP.
    character - package character
     
    CharacterSelectScene - Class in application.scene
    Scene where both players choose their character (Dog or Cat) before a match.
    CharacterSelectScene() - Constructor for class application.scene.CharacterSelectScene
     
    clearAngleLock() - Method in class game.Projectile
    Releases the angle lock so oscillation resumes on the next Projectile.startAiming(boolean) call.
    clearWindEffect(int) - Method in class game.StatusManager
    Forcefully clears the wind effect on a specific player (used by Cat's AIM ability).
    Controller - Class in game
    Central game-logic hub for one match.
    Controller(BasePlayer, BasePlayer) - Constructor for class game.Controller
     
    COOLDOWN - Static variable in class attack.FireAttack
    Turns before this attack is available again.
    COOLDOWN - Static variable in class attack.IceAttack
    Turns before this attack is available again.
    COOLDOWN - Static variable in class attack.WindAttack
    Turns before this attack is available again.

    D

    decreaseHp(int) - Method in class character.BasePlayer
     
    DogPlayer - Class in character
    Dog character.
    DogPlayer() - Constructor for class character.DogPlayer
    Creates a Dog with 10 max HP and 10 starting HP.
    draw() - Method in class renderer.EffectRenderer
    Draws all active status-effect overlays and particles for one frame.
    draw() - Method in class renderer.HudRenderer
    Draws the full HUD for the current frame: panel backgrounds, player labels, VS text, HP bars, and the turn indicator.
    draw() - Method in class renderer.ProjectileRenderer
    Draws the projectile for the current frame.
    draw() - Method in class renderer.SkillButtonRenderer
    Draws both players' button rows.

    E

    EffectRenderer - Class in renderer
    Draws particle-based visual effects for the three status effects: Burn, Freeze, and Wind.
    EffectRenderer(GraphicsContext, Controller) - Constructor for class renderer.EffectRenderer
     
    EndScene - Class in application.scene
    Post-match scene shown after a winner is determined.
    EndScene() - Constructor for class application.scene.EndScene
     

    F

    fire() - Method in class game.Projectile
    Transitions from Projectile.State.AIMING to Projectile.State.FLYING.
    FireAttack - Class in attack
    Fire attack that deals 2 HP of immediate damage on hit.
    FireAttack() - Constructor for class attack.FireAttack
     
    FLYING - Enum constant in enum class game.Projectile.State
    Projectile is in flight; physics applied each frame.
    FROZEN_DISPLAY_FRAMES - Static variable in class game.StatusManager
    Frames the frozen overlay is displayed before the turn is auto-skipped.

    G

    game - package game
     
    GamePlayScene - Class in application.scene
    Wires together all game subsystems and drives the main game loop for one match.
    GamePlayScene() - Constructor for class application.scene.GamePlayScene
     
    GameRenderer - Class in renderer
    Top-level renderer that orchestrates all per-frame drawing for a match.
    GameRenderer(GraphicsContext, Controller, BasePlayer, BasePlayer) - Constructor for class renderer.GameRenderer
    Creates the renderer and all its sub-renderers.
    getAbilityCooldown(boolean) - Method in class game.Controller

    Returns and clears the last projectile result string (e.g.

    Returns the number of turns before this attack may be used again.

    Returns the unique name identifier for this attack (e.g.

    getProjectile() - Method in class game.Controller
     
    getSelectedAttackName() - Method in class game.Controller

    getState() - Method in class game.Projectile
     
    getTrail() - Method in class game.Projectile
     
    getTrajectoryPoints(int) - Method in class game.Projectile
    Computes sample positions along the predicted parabolic arc for the aiming preview.
    getWindCooldown(boolean) - Method in class game.Controller
     
    getWindFrameCounter() - Method in class game.StatusManager
     
    getWindTargetPlayer() - Method in class game.Controller
     
    getWindTargetPlayer() - Method in class game.StatusManager
     
    getWindTurnsLeft() - Method in class game.Controller
     
    getWindTurnsLeft() - Method in class game.StatusManager
     
    getWindXOffset(int) - Method in class game.Controller
    Returns the cosine-based horizontal displacement for a wind-affected player.
    getX() - Method in class game.Projectile
     
    getY() - Method in class game.Projectile
     
    GRAVITY - Static variable in class game.Projectile
    Downward acceleration in pixels per frame².
    GROUND_Y - Static variable in class game.Projectile
    Ground Y coordinate (pixels from top of canvas).

    H

    handleAbility() - Method in class game.Controller
    Activates the current player's special ability if off cooldown and the projectile is IDLE.
    HandleInput - Class in application
    Translates raw JavaFX input events into Controller calls.
    HandleInput(Scene, Controller) - Constructor for class application.HandleInput
     
    handleSpacebar() - Method in class game.Controller
    Handles a SPACE key press.
    HEAL - Enum constant in enum class character.AbilityType
    Dog's ability: restore 1 HP and end the turn.
    HudRenderer - Class in renderer
    Draws the heads-up display (HUD) overlay on the game canvas.
    HudRenderer(GraphicsContext, Controller, BasePlayer, BasePlayer) - Constructor for class renderer.HudRenderer
     

    I

    IceAttack - Class in attack
    Ice attack that deals 1 HP of immediate damage and freezes the target for one turn.
    IceAttack() - Constructor for class attack.IceAttack
     
    IDLE - Enum constant in enum class game.Projectile.State
    Not in use.
    isAngleLocked() - Method in class game.Projectile
     
    isCurrentPlayerFrozen() - Method in class game.Controller
     
    isHit() - Method in class game.Projectile
     
    isPerfectAimReady() - Method in class character.BasePlayer
     
    isPerfectAimReady() - Method in class character.CatPlayer
     
    isPlayer1Turn() - Method in class game.Controller
     
    isPlayer1Turn() - Method in class game.Projectile
     

    L

    LAUNCH_SPEED - Static variable in class game.Projectile
    Launch speed in pixels per frame.

    M

    main(String[]) - Static method in class application.Main
    Launches the JavaFX runtime.
    Main - Class in application
    JavaFX application entry point for AnimalWizard.
    Main() - Constructor for class application.Main
     
    MAX_ANGLE - Static variable in class game.Projectile
    Maximum oscillation angle in degrees.
    MIN_ANGLE - Static variable in class game.Projectile
    Minimum oscillation angle in degrees.

    N

    NormalAttack - Class in attack
    Standard attack that deals exactly 1 HP of immediate damage.
    NormalAttack() - Constructor for class attack.NormalAttack
     

    O

    onResult(String) - Method in class renderer.GameRenderer
    Stores a projectile result string to be displayed as a flash overlay.
    onTurnSwitched(int) - Method in class game.StatusManager
    Decrements the wind turn counter for the player whose turn just ended.

    P

    P1_BOX_X1 - Static variable in class game.Projectile
    Left edge of P1's hit box.
    P1_BOX_X2 - Static variable in class game.Projectile
    Right edge of P1's hit box.
    P1_BTN_X - Static variable in class renderer.SkillButtonRenderer
    X centres of P1's five buttons, left to right.
    P1_START_X - Static variable in class game.Projectile
    X coordinate of P1's launch point.
    P1_START_Y - Static variable in class game.Projectile
    Y coordinate of P1's launch point.
    P2_BOX_X1 - Static variable in class game.Projectile
    Left edge of P2's hit box.
    P2_BOX_X2 - Static variable in class game.Projectile
    Right edge of P2's hit box.
    P2_BTN_X - Static variable in class renderer.SkillButtonRenderer
    X centres of P2's five buttons, left to right.
    P2_START_X - Static variable in class game.Projectile
    X coordinate of P2's launch point.
    P2_START_Y - Static variable in class game.Projectile
    Y coordinate of P2's launch point.
    Physics (each FLYING frame) - Search tag in class game.Projectile
    Section
    PhysicsUtils - Class in game
    Stateless utility class for physics calculations used by Controller.
    PhysicsUtils() - Constructor for class game.PhysicsUtils
     
    playFightBGM() - Static method in class game.SoundManager
    Starts the fight BGM loop (stops any currently playing BGM first).
    playFireLoop() - Static method in class game.SoundManager
    Starts the fire SFX in a continuous loop.
    playIceLoop() - Static method in class game.SoundManager
    Starts the ice SFX in a continuous loop.
    playLobbyBGM() - Static method in class game.SoundManager
    Starts the lobby BGM loop (stops any currently playing BGM first).
    playWindLoop() - Static method in class game.SoundManager
    Starts the wind SFX in a continuous loop.
    process() - Method in class application.HandleInput
    Registers key-pressed and mouse-clicked handlers on the scene.
    Projectile - Class in game
    Models a single projectile with a three-state lifecycle: IDLE → AIMING → FLYING → IDLE.
    Projectile() - Constructor for class game.Projectile
     
    Projectile.State - Enum Class in game
    Lifecycle states.
    ProjectileRenderer - Class in renderer
    Draws the projectile in its two active states: AIMING and FLYING.
    ProjectileRenderer(GraphicsContext, Controller) - Constructor for class renderer.ProjectileRenderer
     

    R

    recreate() - Method in class character.BasePlayer
     
    recreate() - Method in class character.CatPlayer
     
    recreate() - Method in class character.DogPlayer
     
    render() - Method in class renderer.GameRenderer
    Draws one complete frame in layer order: background → HUD → skill buttons → effects → projectile → result flash.
    renderer - package renderer
     
    reset() - Method in class game.Projectile
    Resets all state to IDLE and clears trail and offsets.
    reset() - Method in class renderer.EffectRenderer
    Clears all live particles — called when a new match starts.
    reset() - Method in class renderer.GameRenderer
    Clears the result flash and resets all particle effects.
    resetAbilityEffect() - Method in class character.BasePlayer
    Clears the perfect-aim flag after the angle has been applied.
    resetAbilityEffect() - Method in class character.CatPlayer
    Clears the perfect-aim flag after the angle has been applied.

    S

    selectAttack(Attackable) - Method in class game.Controller
    Sets the attack type for the current turn.
    setHp(int) - Method in class character.BasePlayer
     
    setLaunchOffset(double) - Method in class game.Projectile
     
    setLockedAngle(double) - Method in class game.Projectile
    Locks the launch angle (Cat's perfect-aim ability).
    setTargetOffset(double) - Method in class game.Projectile
     
    SkillButtonRenderer - Class in renderer
    Draws the five skill-selection circles for both players at the top of the canvas.
    SkillButtonRenderer(GraphicsContext, Controller) - Constructor for class renderer.SkillButtonRenderer
     
    SoundManager - Class in game
    Manages all game audio: background music (BGM) and looping sound effects (SFX).
    SoundManager() - Constructor for class game.SoundManager
     
    start(Stage) - Method in class application.Main
    JavaFX lifecycle entry point.
    startAiming(boolean) - Method in class game.Projectile
    Transitions to Projectile.State.AIMING for the given player's turn.
    startGame(BasePlayer, BasePlayer) - Method in class application.scene.GamePlayScene
    Initialises and starts a new match for the two given players.
    StartScene - Class in application.scene
    The main-menu scene shown when the application starts.
    StartScene() - Constructor for class application.scene.StartScene
     
    StatusManager - Class in game
    Manages the three time-limited status effects: Burn, Freeze, and Wind.
    StatusManager() - Constructor for class game.StatusManager
     
    stopBGM() - Static method in class game.SoundManager
    Stops the currently playing BGM.
    stopFire() - Static method in class game.SoundManager
    Stops the looping fire SFX.
    stopIce() - Static method in class game.SoundManager
    Stops the looping ice SFX.
    stopWind() - Static method in class game.SoundManager
    Stops the looping wind SFX.

    U

    update() - Method in class game.Controller
    Advances the game by one frame: syncs wind offsets, updates the projectile, processes burn ticks, and checks for a frozen-turn auto-skip.
    update() - Method in class game.Projectile
    Advances the projectile by one frame.
    updateBurn(BasePlayer, BasePlayer) - Method in class game.StatusManager
    Advances burn timers and applies 1 HP damage per completed tick.
    updateFreeze(boolean) - Method in class game.StatusManager
    Counts down the frozen display timer and signals turn-skip when it expires.
    updateWindFrame() - Method in class game.StatusManager
    Increments the wind frame counter if a wind effect is active.

    V

    valueOf(String) - Static method in enum class character.AbilityType
    Returns the enum constant of this class with the specified name.
    valueOf(String) - Static method in enum class game.Projectile.State
    Returns the enum constant of this class with the specified name.
    values() - Static method in enum class character.AbilityType
    Returns an array containing the constants of this enum class, in the order they are declared.
    values() - Static method in enum class game.Projectile.State
    Returns an array containing the constants of this enum class, in the order they are declared.

    W

    WIND_TURNS - Static variable in class game.StatusManager
    Number of turns the wind oscillation lasts.
    WindAttack - Class in attack
    Wind attack that deals 1 HP of immediate damage and causes the target to oscillate horizontally for StatusManager.WIND_TURNS turn(s), making them harder to hit.
    WindAttack() - Constructor for class attack.WindAttack
     
    window - Static variable in class application.Main
    The application's primary window; shared across all scenes.
    A B C D E F G H I L M N O P R S U V W 
    All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages|Constant Field Values
